data.name: Strip Black Jack - Manga Edition
data.detailed_description:
Details:

You always wanted to know how your neighbour's adult and beautiful daughter looks naked and maybe even sleep with her? 
Well, now's your chance! With this amazing game "Strip Black Jack"!
At the beginning the cute one is still shy and fully dressed.
But if you play against her quirky father, you can quickly change that.
Soon you'll have the money to make her drop her first clothes for you!
This will make her hotter and hotter and when she has dropped all her clothes she will be so horny that she will play with herself. First she will satisfy herself with her fingers and later with her dildo. Of course you are allowed to watch!
When she is really horny she will satisfy you.

In the end, you even get to sleep with her!
 

Features:

  • 6 striptease levels, each with up to 7 different poses!
  • Several videos that you can play interactively at different playback speeds
  • Awesome manga graphic!
  • Lots of achievements!
  • Save in the Steam Cloud!
  • At the beginning she's fully dressed. At highest striptease level she plays with her dildo!
  • When she's really horny, she'll satisfy you!
  • In the end, you even get to sleep with her!

data.short_description: You've always wanted to know what your neighbour's beautiful daughter looks like naked and sleep with her? Now's your chance! At the beginning she is shy and fully dressed. But soon you will have the money to make her drop her first clothes for you!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or later
  • 處理器: 1 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512 MB Graphics Card
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8 or later
  • 處理器: 2.6 GHz Dual Core
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB Graphics Card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
